description: Use this API to return an array of real values for a GCAP curve. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.6.1. ierr, rarray = agcapreal(ibus,id,string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the GCAP quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*COUNT elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains COUNT elements. (output).
